title: LCP Ruby Page Definition
description: Schema for page metadata that defines a standalone page composed of zones (presenter regions and/or widgets). Pages are defined in config/lcp_ruby/pages/ as YAML files. Each page has a unique name, optional slug for routing, and one or more zones that display presenter content or widgets (KPI cards, text blocks, lists).

name.description: Unique identifier for this page. Used in view group references and dialog targets.

slug.description: URL slug that makes this page routable. Pages without a slug are only accessible as dialog targets. Must be unique across all pages.

model.description: The model this page is associated with. Standalone dashboard pages may omit this. Used for permission checks and breadcrumb context.

layout.description: Layout mode for zone arrangement. 'semantic' uses named areas (main, sidebar). 'grid' uses CSS grid with explicit row/col positioning.

title_key.description: i18n key for the page title. Falls back to humanized page name when not set or translation missing.

dialog.description: Dialog rendering configuration. When present, this page can be rendered inside a modal dialog.

zones.description: List of zones (content regions) on this page. Each zone displays either a presenter or a widget. Order matters for semantic layout; grid layout uses explicit positions.

dialog_config.description: Configuration for rendering this page as a modal dialog.

closable.description: Whether the dialog can be closed by clicking outside or pressing Escape.

title_key.description: i18n key for the dialog title bar. Falls back to page title.

zone.description: A content region within the page. Either a presenter zone (displays a full presenter) or a widget zone (displays a KPI card, text block, or list).

name.description: Unique identifier for this zone within the page.

type.description: Zone type. 'presenter' (default) renders a full presenter. 'widget' renders a standalone widget.

presenter.description: Presenter name to render in this zone. Required for presenter zones.

area.description: Named area for semantic layout placement.

position.description: Explicit grid positioning for grid layout pages.

scope.description: Named scope to apply to the zone's data query. Must exist on the resolved model.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to display in this zone.

visible_when.description: Condition for conditional zone visibility. Supports role shortcut or full condition objects.

scope_context.description: Mapping of column names on the zone's model to dynamic references resolved from the parent record or request context. Used to scope zone data to the parent record (e.g., { employee_id: ':record_id' }).

label_key.description: i18n key for the zone's tab label. Recommended for tab zones. Falls back to humanized zone name.

kpi_card_widget.description: KPI card widget displaying an aggregate value (count, sum, avg, min, max) over a model's records.

aggregate_field.description: Field to aggregate. Required for sum/avg/min/max. Defaults to 'id' for count.

format.description: Display format for the aggregate value.

icon.description: Icon name displayed on the KPI card.

link_to.description: Page slug to navigate to when the KPI card is clicked.

label_key.description: i18n key for the KPI card label.

content_key.description: i18n key for the text content.

list_widget.description: List widget displaying recent records from a model.

link_to.description: Page slug for the 'view all' link.

label_key.description: i18n key for the list widget header.

grid_position.description: CSS grid positioning for grid layout pages. Uses a 12-column grid.

role_condition.description: Simple role-based visibility condition. Zone is visible only to users with the specified role(s).

role.description: Role name or array of role names.

condition_object.description: Full condition object supporting field, service, compound (all/any/not), and collection conditions. See condition operators reference for details.
